name: MemContext
description: Hosted long-term memory for OpenClaw backed by MemContext.in.

apiKey.label: MemContext API Key
apiKey.help: Your MemContext API key from app.memcontext.in (or use ${MEMCONTEXT_OPENCLAW_API_KEY}).

project.label: Project Scope
project.help: Optional fixed MemContext project scope. Leave empty to derive from the workspace.

projectStrategy.label: Project Strategy
projectStrategy.help: How the plugin picks the MemContext project scope.

autoRecall.label: Auto Recall
autoRecall.help: Search MemContext before each user turn and inject relevant memories.

autoCapture.label: Auto Capture
autoCapture.help: Opt-in: save filtered durable user and project facts after successful turns.

maxRecallResults.label: Max Recall Results
maxRecallResults.help: Maximum memories injected into prompt context per turn.

flushOnReset.label: Flush On Reset
flushOnReset.help: Opt-in: persist a filtered summary before session reset.

flushOnCompaction.label: Flush On Compaction
flushOnCompaction.help: Opt-in: persist a filtered summary before compaction.

requestTimeoutMs.label: Request Timeout
requestTimeoutMs.help: HTTP timeout in milliseconds for MemContext API calls.

debug.label: Debug Logging
debug.help: Enable verbose logs for plugin actions and API calls.
